channel.title: CodeChaos Blog
channel.description: CodeChaos is an open coding club for students focused on building, collaborating, and shipping real software.

item.title: Welcome to CodeChaos Blog
item.description: Why we started this blog and what students can expect.

item.title: How We Run Chaos Sprint
item.description: The structure behind our 90-minute product build format.

item.title: First Open Source PR Guide
item.description: A practical path to your first merged contribution.
